title: AwesomeMod
description: A Mod that adds new tools, armour and ores to the game enhancing and expanding the vanilla minecraft experience! (This Mod is required on clientside and serverside)
body: Find and Discover precious new ores and craft powerful tools to overcome any oppenents you may face. Download this mod for an additional 2 more tiers of tools and armour and many more additions to come! You can craft these tools by mining the jonkler ore and sigma ore found underground, with stats high above the vanilla minecraft stats you are sure to be safe whilst equipped with this legendary armour! (This mod is required on both clientside and serverside)
